productDisplayName: Basics Men Brown Slim Fit Shirt
description: CompositionBrown shirt made of 100% cotton, has a tipped collar with a full front buttoned placket, short sleeves with brand badge at the left arm and sleeve joint, buttoned flap pockets on either chest, eyelet on back neck and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryDesigned for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this semi-formal shirt from basics is a great addition to your wardrobe.
